caption: The video features a presentation at EuroPython 2018 in Edinburgh, held from July 23-29, 2018. The speaker, dressed in a suit and standing behind a podium, is addressing an audience on the topic of "Learning by Example: Building a Tech Startup." The background slide prominently displays the title of the session, emphasizing the practical approach to learning through real-world examples. The setting appears to be a professional conference environment, with the speaker engaging the audience on strategies and insights related to launching and growing a technology startup. The overall atmosphere suggests an informative and educational session aimed at attendees interested in entrepreneurship and tech innovation.
